info.name: Custom Layout
info.summary: Modern SaaS-style sidebar navigation for Nextcloud
info.description:
Replaces the default Nextcloud horizontal app menu with a modern, foldable left sidebar inspired by contemporary SaaS dashboards.
Features: - Foldable left sidebar (icons-only when collapsed) - Grouped navigation (Main, Collaboration, Project Management, Administration) - Persistent collapsed state (localStorage) - Responsive (auto-collapse on small screens) - Non-invasive: pure CSS + JS overlay, no core file changes
Compatible with Nextcloud 32.x.
info.author: Custom Layout
